title: The Fighting Tï؟½mï؟½raire
content:
آ آ آ آ It was eight bells ringing,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ For the morning watch was done,
آ آ آ آ And the gunner's lads were singing
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ As they polished every gun.
آ آ آ آ It was eight bells ringing,
آ آ آ آ And the gunner's lads were singing,
آ آ آ آ For the ship she rode a-swinging,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ As they polished every gun.

آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Oh! to see the linstock lighting,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Tï؟½mï؟½raire! Tï؟½mï؟½raire!
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Oh! to hear the round shot biting,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Tï؟½mï؟½raire! Tï؟½mï؟½raire!

آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Oh! to see the linstock lighting,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ And to hear the round shot biting,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ For we're all in love with fighting
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ On the fighting Tï؟½mï؟½raire.

آ آ آ آ It was noontide ringing,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ And the battle just begun,
آ آ آ آ When the ship her way was winging,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ As they loaded every gun.
آ آ آ آ It was noontide ringing,
آ آ آ آ When the ship her way was winging,
آ آ آ آ And the gunner's lads were singing
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ As they loaded every gun.

آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ There'll be many grim and gory,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Tï؟½mï؟½raire! Tï؟½mï؟½raire!
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ There'll be few to tell the story,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Tï؟½mï؟½raire! Tï؟½mï؟½raire!

آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ There'll be many grim and gory,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ There'll be few to tell the story,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ But we'll all be one in glory
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ With the Fighting Tï؟½mï؟½raire.

آ آ آ آ There's a far bell ringing
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ At the setting of the sun,
آ آ آ آ And a phantom voice is singing
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Of the great days done.
آ آ آ آ There's a far bell ringing,
آ آ آ آ And a phantom voice is singing
آ آ آ آ Of renown for ever clinging
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ To the great days done.

آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Now the sunset breezes shiver,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Tï؟½mï؟½raire! Tï؟½mï؟½raire!
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ And she's fading down the river,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Tï؟½mï؟½raire! Tï؟½mï؟½raire!

آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ Now the sunset's breezes shiver,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ And she's fading down the river,
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ But in England's song for ever
آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ آ She's the Fighting Tï؟½mï؟½raire.
meaning:
"The Fighting Tï؟½mï؟½raire" is a quintessential example of Henry John Newbolt, Sir's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
